_description: Phase 3 DIMM-top residual cycle deltas between the Regime-B sim and the cycle-accurate RTL, annotated with FSM-level root causes. A per-stage delta present here is accepted by run_checks.py (DIMM latency path) as long as |delta - expected_delta_cycles| <= expected_delta_tolerance.

_schema.delta_cycles: RTL - sim (positive = RTL slower than sim)
_schema.root_cause: file:line citation of the structural or FSM-handshake source of the residual

note: Phase 4 (2026-04-20) — wsum structural delta closed by widening ws_exp from KW=NUM_COLS=1 to KW=NUM_COLS=128 in gen_attention_wrapper.py::_gen_dimm_weighted_sum. The N/2=64 fires-per-output-element inner loop is replaced by a single DPE fire per output column m (4 fires per lane at d=64, W=16), and a streaming 7-level-equivalent reduction tree sums the 128 packed ws_exp outputs into a scalar. ws_log remains scalar (KW=1) and overlaps with WS_LOAD_A to avoid a ~60-cyc widening overhead on the log preprocessing path. Residual wsum Δ dropped from +38 structural → +16 modelling_granularity (FSM boundaries around WS_LOG_FEED/WS_LOG_DRAIN/WS_EXP_FEED/WS_EXP_DRAIN, plus the packer latency). Phase 3 (2026-04-19) residual stage deltas pre-Phase-4: score +16, softmax +10, wsum +38, e2e +64.

deltas.root_cause: Residual FSM overhead beyond the +4 cyc/pass handshake already baked into _compute_sim_per_row. Score FSM iterations = cols_per_dpe = 4 passes (nldpe_dimm_top_d64_c128.v:300-301); per pass the probe window additionally includes ~4 cycles of SRAM-read pipeline fill before the first w_buf_en strobe (q_sram/k_sram registered reads, nldpe_dimm_top_d64_c128.v:112-118) that gemm_log rolls into `feed_cycles` but the RTL serialises behind S_COMPUTE entry. Total residual 4 iter x 4 cyc = 16 cyc.

Softmax probe starts at score's first S_OUTPUT but the softmax FSM at that moment is still mid-SM_LOAD (softmax_approx @ nldpe_dimm_top_d64_c128.v:452-454). The sim extraction assumes the probe opens exactly at SM_EXP entry; the residual is the trailing SM_LOAD duration (bounded above by N/W=8 cycles) plus the two one-cycle state transitions SM_LOAD->SM_EXP and SM_NORMALIZE->SM_OUTPUT (nldpe_dimm_top_d64_c128.v:454,472). Total ~10 cyc.

Phase-4 modelling_granularity residual after widening ws_exp from 1x1 to 128x128 (gen_attention_wrapper.py::_gen_dimm_weighted_sum). Per-m cost matches sim at ~60 cyc (27-cyc feed + 33-cyc drain ≈ cycles_per_pass+4), but wsum also incurs a one-time pre-m setup not counted by gemm_log: 1 cyc IDLE→LOAD_A + 8 cyc LOAD_A (byte-serial attn_sram write from softmax output, overlapped with ws_log feed) + 1 cyc LOG_FEED + 1 cyc LOG_DRAIN + 1 cyc LOAD_V ≈ 12 cyc. With 4-cyc accumulator-clear handoff between m iterations, the residual totals ~16 cyc. Not structural: arises from FSM state transitions and SRAM packer latency, both of which gemm_log rolls into steady-state assumptions.

Sum of per-stage residuals: score (16) + softmax (10) + wsum (16) = 42 cyc. Post-Phase-4 e2e delta is no longer structural — all components are modelling_granularity (FSM handshakes, SRAM packer latencies, DPE stub COMPUTE_CYCLES=3 vs sim's 1).
